title: goniophlebium lanuginosum
intro: Goniophlebium lanuginosum, also known as the woolly goniophlebium, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Goniophlebium lanuginosum include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and processed into infusions, teas, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
